name: Sklearn XGBoost Regressor
description: XGBoost Regressor implements gradient boosted decision trees for regression problems. It is designed for high performance, scalability, and accuracy by combining multiple weak learners in a sequential manner to minimize prediction error.

fields.name: targetCol
fields.title: Target Column
fields.description: Target column containing the continuous numeric values that the regression model is trained to predict.

fields.name: featureCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: List of feature columns used as input variables for training the XGBoost regression model. All features must be numeric, boolean, or vector-compatible.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Ratio used to split the dataset into training and testing subsets. A value of 1.0 uses the full dataset for training.

fields.name: n_estimators
fields.title: Number of Estimators
fields.description: Number of boosting rounds or decision trees built sequentially to form the final regression model.

fields.name: max_depth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Maximum depth of each individual tree. Larger values increase model complexity and risk of overfitting.

fields.name: learning_rate
fields.title: Learning Rate
fields.description: Step size shrinkage applied to each boosting step. Smaller values require more trees but improve generalization.

fields.name: subsample
fields.title: Subsample
fields.description: Fraction of training samples used to grow each tree. Lower values introduce randomness and help prevent overfitting.

fields.name: colsample_bytree
fields.title: Colsample Bytree
fields.description: Fraction of features randomly selected for constructing each tree, increasing diversity among trees.

fields.name: colsample_bylevel
fields.title: Colsample Bylevel
fields.description: Fraction of features sampled at each level of the tree, controlling feature usage during splits.

fields.name: colsample_bynode
fields.title: Colsample Bynode
fields.description: Fraction of features sampled at each split node, providing fine-grained feature subsampling.

fields.name: reg_alpha
fields.title: Reg Alpha (L1)
fields.description: L1 regularization term applied to leaf weights, encouraging sparsity and feature selection.

fields.name: reg_lambda
fields.title: Reg Lambda (L2)
fields.description: L2 regularization term applied to leaf weights to reduce overfitting and improve model stability.

fields.name: gamma
fields.title: Gamma
fields.description: Minimum loss reduction required for a split to occur. Higher values make the model more conservative.

fields.name: min_child_weight
fields.title: Min Child Weight
fields.description: Minimum sum of instance weights required in a child node. Controls tree growth and model robustness.

fields.name: max_delta_step
fields.title: Max Delta Step
fields.description: Maximum allowed change in leaf weight estimation. Useful for stabilizing updates in highly imbalanced targets.

fields.name: random_state
fields.title: Random State
fields.description: Seed used for random number generation to ensure reproducible training results.

fields.name: n_jobs
fields.title: Number of Jobs
fields.description: Number of parallel threads used during training. A value of -1 utilizes all available cores.

fields.name: verbosity
fields.title: Verbosity
fields.description: Controls the level of training log output, ranging from silent execution to detailed debug information.

fields.name: booster
fields.title: Booster
fields.description: Type of booster used for learning, such as tree-based, linear, or dropout-based boosting.

fields.name: tree_method
fields.title: Tree Method
fields.description: Algorithm used to construct decision trees, optimized for speed, accuracy, or hardware acceleration.

fields.name: objective
fields.title: Objective
fields.description: Objective function defining the learning task and loss function optimized during training.

fields.name: eval_metric
fields.title: Evaluation Metric
fields.description: Metric used to evaluate model performance on validation data during training.

fields.name: early_stopping_rounds
fields.title: Early Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stops training early if the evaluation metric does not improve for the specified number of consecutive rounds.
